items.scenario: A startup wants Claude to write investor updates automatically from raw metrics each month.
items.question: Is this a good use case as described?
items.answer: Partially—Claude can draft narrative from pasted metrics, but humans must verify numbers, material disclosures, and legal wording before sending to investors. Fully automated sends without review are an anti-pattern.

items.scenario: Support receives 500 tickets/day repeating the same 20 FAQ answers.
items.question: What Claude use case pattern fits?
items.answer: Retrieval-grounded FAQ assist or an API bot backed by curated articles, with human escalation for novel cases—not raw chat with no knowledge base.
